name: Captain Edward Continues
short_description: Want to continue playing as a time traveling pirate? Now is your chance with Captain Edward Continues. 100s of cutscenes, jokes, and other oddities to make you and your friends laugh. Want to just shoot robots, goblins, and gang members? You can do that, too!
detailed_description:
Captain Edward Continues is a first person shooter that focuses more on the comical side of the cutscenes, rather than run and gun action. You'll have many laughs. Pickup ammo, shoot robots, goblins, mafia, and gang members in this comically hilarious adventure.

This game starts in the ages of pirates. Where Captain Edward and his crew mates must restock supplies. After defeating the second boss, Edward and his crew mates are separated through time. Bring the crew back together. Get your supplies. Travel between the Medieval, Viking, Pirate, Present, and Future eras. Packed with several dozen cutscenes, you're sure to get a good laugh. This sequel is just like the first Captain Edward game but with a lot more content.

What's new in this sequel, you ask? There are a lot more cutscenes. A weapon wheel. Two new weapons, such as a sword and the Hammer of Smashed Snot! Watching every cutscene and getting 100% will guarantee at least 2 hours of game play along with hours of humor you and your friends can talk about.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
